name: SAMURAI YAIBA ★ YOUR TURN TO DIE
description:
Screams from the crowd are drowned out by your ears as you focus on the band before you. You think to yourself, nothing could get better than this.

Until Reko Yabusame in all her glory diverts all the attention towards you, asking you to come up on stage.
